creator: lippemail@gmail.com
text:
Em Fri, 21 Mar 2008 17:16:54 -0700 (PDT)
bf <bf2006a@yahoo.com> escreveu:

> Please consider the attached patch in lieu of those
> that have been submitted. It updates sbcl to 1.0.15,
> and enables the futex-emulation code if
> WITH_THREADS=yes, since we don't have native futexes
> in FreeBSD (outside of the Linuxulator, anyway).  I
> didn't rework the PORTDOCS like the previous committer
> did, because I didn't see a point in installing html
> documentation that is just a copy of the info files
> that were already being installed: if someone wants
> it, they can always do the conversion themselves.  And
> building and installing the pdf or postscript docs,
> also redundant, would require a dependency on teTeX. 
> The only useful thing I can see in this regard would
> be to implement the NOPORTDOCS wrapper, probably by
> adding a (disable :sb-doc) line to
> files/customize-target-features.lisp, 
> or by commenting out the appropriate line in
> base-target-features.lisp-expr with sed, and then
> fixing the pkg-plist.  I didn't do it because it
> seemed more trouble than it was worth.
> 
> bf.
> 
> 
> 
>       ____________________________________________________________________________________
> Looking for last minute shopping deals?  
> Find them fast with Yahoo! Search.
> http://tools.search.yahoo.com/newsearch/category.php?category=shopping

Hi bf,

For some reason, this port doesn't extract and build on 5-FreeBSD, I'm
investigating him.

-- 
lippe@FreeBSD.org
Felippe de Meirelles Motta
